lines.english: They die, and are reborn, over and over, again and again. ||2||
They do not remember the Name of the Creator Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧੇ ਗੁਰੂ ਤੇ ਭਰਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: andhe guroo te bharam na jaaee |
lines.english: Those whose guru is spiritually blind - their doubts are not dispelled.
Abandoning the Source of all, they have become attached to the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੁ ਕਾ ਮਾਤਾ ਬਿਖੁ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bikh kaa maataa bikh maeh samaaee |3|
lines.english: Infected with poison, they are immersed in poison. ||3||
Believing Maya to be the source of all, they wander in doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਸੋ ਪਰਮ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਏ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jis nadar kare so param gat paae |4|
lines.english: The supreme status is obtained only by those who are blessed with His Glance of Grace. ||4||
They have forgotten the Dear Lord, and they are in love with duality.
One who has Truth pervading within, radiates Truth outwardly as well.
The Gurmukhs keep their consciousness lovingly centered on the Lord.
The spiritually wise know this intuitively. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੁ ਨ ਛਪੈ ਜੇ ਕੋ ਰਖੈ ਛਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: saach na chhapai je ko rakhai chhapaae |
lines.english: The Truth does not remain hidden, even though one may try to hide it.
The True Guru, The Giver, preaches the Shabad.
Ego and Maya are burned away by the Word of the Shabad.
My True God unites them in His Union. ||6||
He controls, and restrains, and holds still the wandering mind.
Understanding is obtained through the Perfect Guru. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰਤਾ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸਿਰਜਿ ਜਿਨਿ ਗੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: aape karataa srisatt siraj jin goee |
lines.english: The Creator Himself has created the universe; He Himself shall destroy it.
Gauree, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: tis bin doojaa avar na koee |
lines.english: Without Him, there is no other at all.
O Nanak, how rare are those who, as Gurmukh, understand this! ||8||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਸੋ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jis no kripaa kare so har ras paavai |1|
lines.english: They obtain the Lord's Name; the Lord showers His Mercy upon them. ||1||
The Gurmukhs obtain the Naam, the Priceless Name of the Lord.
With their tongues, they continually sing the Ambrosial Naam.
They serve the Name, and through the Name, they are absorbed in intuitive peace and poise.
Night and day, within your heart, meditate on the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਵਉ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਸੂਖਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh paavau param pad sookhaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs obtain the supreme state of peace. ||1||Pause||
They become the constant slaves of the slaves of the Lord's slaves.
Peace comes to fill the hearts of those
who, as Gurmukh, sing of the True Lord, the treasure of excellence.
They alone obtain the supreme treasure.
How rare are those who, as Gurmukh, become Jivan Mukta - liberated while yet alive.
Within their households and families, they remain always detached. ||2||
They are intuitively absorbed in the True Lord God. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹ ਕੁਟੰਬ ਸਿਉ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: moh kuttanb siau preet na hoe |
lines.english: Emotional attachment to family does not exist,
Eradicating the three qualities, they become pure.
One who recognizes the Hukam of the Lord's Command understands the True Lord. ||4||
when the True Lord abides within the heart.
The mind of the Gurmukh is pierced through and held steady.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਕਰਤਾ ਮੈ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: toon karataa mai avar na koe |
lines.english: You are the Creator Lord - there is no other for me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਝੁ ਸੇਵੀ ਤੁਝ ਤੇ ਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: tujh sevee tujh te pat hoe |
lines.english: I serve You, and through You, I obtain honor.
God showers His Mercy, and I sing His Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਰਤਨੁ ਸਭ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਲੋਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: naam ratan sabh jag meh loe |5|
lines.english: The light of the jewel of the Naam permeates the entire world. ||5||
Deep within, their hearts blossom forth; night and day, they lovingly center themselves on the Lord.
To the Gurmukhs, the Word of God's Bani seems so sweet.
The True Lord is intuitively obtained, by His Grace.
The True Guru is obtained by the destiny of perfect good fortune. ||6||
Egotism, possessiveness, evil-mindedness and suffering depart,
when the Lord's Name, the Ocean of Virtue, comes to dwell within the heart.
The intellect of the Gurmukhs is awakened, and they praise God,
when the Lord's Lotus Feet come to dwell within the heart. ||7||
The Gurmukhs shed their ego, and merge with the Lord.
The True Name abides within their hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੇਇ ਸੋਈ ਜਨੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jis naam dee soee jan paae |
lines.english: They alone receive the Naam, unto whom it is given.
Gauree, Third Mehl:
O Nanak, they are intuitively absorbed in the True Lord. ||8||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਹੀ ਮਨੁ ਸਵਾਰਿਆ ਭੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man hee man savaariaa bhai sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: The mind has intuitively healed itself, through the Fear of God.
